offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause late orders. We provide cash flow monitoring and forecasting instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem: Cash flow gaps due to fluctuating sales and expenses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about cash flow
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Share insights in Etsy seller forums and groups
try_it: Let users try cash flow monitoring on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common cash flow scenarios as templates
Set default reminders for cash flow checks
Allow CSV import for existing cash flow data
Enable one-click export of cash flow reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
